📲
Install Sachi
Add to home screen — free

Welcome to Sachi

Your stage. Share short videos with the world.

💡 Tip: Add Sachi to your home screen for the full app experience — tap the 📲 Install button in the bottom nav anytime!

📲 Install Sachi

Chrome requires you to visit the site twice before the auto-install kicks in. Here's the fastest way right now:
1. Tap ⋮ (3 dots, top right of Chrome)
2. Tap "Add to Home screen"
3. Tap Add — done! ✅
🌐 Open in Chrome
1. Open in Safari (not Chrome)
2. Tap the ⬆ Share icon at the bottom
3. Scroll down → tap "Add to Home Screen"
4. Tap Add — done! ✅
